# Muhammad Rafay Ali - Cyber Security Engineer Portfolio

> Personal portfolio website for Muhammad Rafay Ali, a Cyber Security Engineer specializing in SOC operations, SIEM engineering, threat detection, and incident response.

## About

Muhammad Rafay Ali is a Cyber Security Engineer with 2+ years of hands-on experience in SOC operations, SIEM engineering, threat detection, incident response, and security hardening. He has deployed and tuned security platforms across multi-server enterprise environments, cutting undetected threat windows by 35% and false positive rates by 45%.

## Core Specializations

- SOC Operations & Real-time Threat Monitoring
- SIEM Engineering (Wazuh, IBM QRadar, Threat Hawk, Microsoft Sentinel)
- Threat Detection & Incident Response
- ISO 27001, NCA-ECC, CIS Benchmarks, MITRE ATT&CK
- Vulnerability Assessment & Penetration Testing
- Security Hardening & Compliance Automation

## Professional Experience

- Cyber Security Engineer at Encbit (Jul 2025 – Present)
- Cyber Security Analyst at Cyber Silo (Feb 2025 – Jul 2025)
- SOC Analyst at Cyber Silo / AIOU (Feb 2024 – Feb 2025)

## Certifications

- ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Lead Auditor – MasterMind
- Certified SOC Analyst Foundation – SIEM XPERT
- ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Information Security Associate – SKILLFRONT
- Cybersecurity Specialization – Google
- Security Analyst Fundamentals – IBM
- Certified in Cybersecurity (CC) – ISC2
- Ethical Hacking & Penetration Testing – Udemy
- Linux 100 – TCM Security
- Active Lab Profile – TryHackMe

## Featured Projects

- Active Directory Attack Simulation & Hardening
- rafucybersec Portfolio (Next.js, TypeScript, GSAP, Three.js)
- NoxShield SIEM Dashboard
- Multi-Sensor Intrusion Detection IoT

## Education

- Bachelor of Science in Computer Science – Hamdard University (2019–2023)
